Description: A row of overwater bungalows with beautiful flowers at their entrance, connected by a wooden walkway, all above clear turquoise water
Lush tea fields on a hillside with trees on the left and center, mountains with trees in the background
Different modern architectural styles of glassy skyscrapers glowing during night with their reflections shimmering on the water below
Small ice blocks floating on the water in the foreground with a large empty icy land in the background
In the foreground, a coastal city of mid-rise buildings along green-touched hills, while distant hills in the background
A beautiful sunset at an empty desert with distant low-rise mountains
Sunlight shines through a dense rainforest, lighting up green moss, and a small waterfall in the background
White calcium shimmering pools hold turquoise water in the foreground, and a green valley with distant high mountains in the background
An incredible view of a towering mountain with its snowy peaks dominating the scene, and lush green slopes below, all are reflected in the mirror-like water
And what could be more beautiful than going to the Kaaba, when you see thousands of worshippers around it, striving to attain the highest ranks?
